name: Reanimator

7: (entomb OR unmask OR griselbrand_in_hand) AND (reanimate OR exhume OR animate_dead) AND B_source
6: entomb AND (reanimate OR exhume OR animate_dead)

goal_sequence.action: Lotus Petal; then Unmask (free, pitch) to strip FoW before building mana
Dark Ritual (3B) → Entomb Griselbrand → Reanimate (1B, pay 8 life)
If no T1 combo: Thoughtseize then reanimate; Exhume as wrap-around
Griselbrand draws 7 per turn — maintain threat density

notes: Sequencing is critical: Unmask BEFORE ritual (otherwise they can Unmask your kill spell via FoW). T1 kill with Swamp + Petal + Unmask + Ritual + Entomb + Reanimate.
